nasb.text: Those who had seen it reported to them how the man who was demon-possessed had been made well.

esv.text: And those who had seen it told them how the demon-possessed man had been healed.

cnv.text: 當時看見的人，把被鬼附過的人怎樣得到醫治，說給他們聽。

ccb.text: 目击者把事情的始末告诉了他们。

csbs.text: 那些看见的人，就告诉大家被鬼魔附身的人怎样得到救治。
